channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipped (by108B EDR) mattresses and bed, 9th March
item.description:
Mattresses and bed frame dumped on Goose Green and East Dulwich Road by Wandle Housing Association resident at 108B East Dulwich Road. Please take enforcement action!!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106, East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Enormous Steaming Pile of Dog Poo on River Path, 9th March
item.description:
Repugnantly Anti-Social - enormous steaming pile of dog-poo abandoned without any regard for the health & safety of our local community. When will we see Enforcement Officers on duty dealing with this repulsive, repugnantly anti-social behaviour...?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dreadnought Walk, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items dumped on the pavement, 9th March
item.description:
There are items frequently left at this spot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 bike’s using up two racks, 9th March
item.description:
These bikes have been abandoned for over 18 months they need to be removed. They are all missing parts. This uses up bike locking space and encourages theft. Please remove the bikes.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shafton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip on Cherry Tree Close, 9th March
item.description:
Fly tip on Cherry Tree Close of Carpet, Cabinet, table & black bags.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): King Edwards Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover broken, 9th March
item.description:
The lid and frame seem loose and make a loud painful noise every time a bus drives over it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harrow Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found, 9th March
item.description:
Vandalised brown bin dumped outside 36 Northchurch Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northchurch Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The cover is damaged and really noisy when cars go over so have trouble getting sleep as my house backs onto road, 9th March
item.description:
Really loud when motors go over and my house backs onto road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thames Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chest of drawers abandoned, 9th March
item.description:
This has been discarded for a week, broken and of no use to anyone

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Stuart Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: DANGEROUS HAZARD – Lime Bikes strewn across the footpath in Horseferry Place, 9th March
item.description:
DANGEROUS HAZARD – 5 Lime Bikes strewn across the "Jubilee Greenway" footpath, in Horseferry Place, and blocking Pedestrians going about their lawful business Unwelcome Street Hazard & Street Clutter Clear & present danger – trip hazard, collision hazard, street clutter – Lime bikes strewn across the footpath in Bardsley Lane, Greenwich, without any consideration for pedestrians, the able bodied or the frail or the disabled or the partially sighted Forest eBike Users know this behaviour is “repugnantly anti-social” – it is extremely offensive and harmful to others, showing a complete disregard for social norms and a complete disregard for the well-being of our Local Community Action requested – please: a) remove (within the next two hours), and, b) create a “geo-fence exclusion zone” in this area I also invite you to issue “your Lime bike user” with either a final-warning, or a £100 fine

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Horseferry Place, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Edgebury Fields, 9th March
item.description:
There is loads of litter and some dumped items in the brambles and field on Edgebury Fields all along Slades Drive from the border with Edgebury School field to Marjorie McClure. Please can it be cleared? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 153,155, Slades Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gully outside 37-43 Streatley Road, 9th March
item.description:
Gully outside 37-43 blocked and filled with leaves. Please arrange clearance.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Streatley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A long pot hole that runs the length of the crossing, 9th March
item.description:
Pothole is long and deep, even when slowing down a considerable amount almost stopping, still majorly affecting tyres on the car. Noticing slow down of traffic going over these lights to restrict damage to cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Cambridge Road, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge/freezer and rubbish dumped, 9th March
item.description:
Outside garage and close to school gate

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small dead tree., 9th March
item.description:
Small dead pavement/kerbside tree outside 37 Holly Park Road. Tree has been dead for at least a year.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Carlton Road, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Back Garden, Flat B 30 Glenmore Road London NW3 4DB, 9th March
item.description:
Resident has reported the trees were removed from the garden, however, the roots have not. She is stating that further works need to take place at the property but they cannot go ahead without the roots being removed first.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Glenilla Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 gas cylinders, 9th March
item.description:
3 gas cylinders left beside house

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Temple Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence down, 9th March
item.description:
This wire fencing is down outside properties near bottom of leesons hill by pathway to 33/35 - dangerous as a drop from here to the road and area is very poorly lit.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: DANGEROUS HAZARD – Lime Bikes strewn across the footpath in Roan Street, 9th March
item.description:
DANGEROUS HAZARD – Eight (8) Lime Bikes strewn across footpath, and blocking Pedestrians going about their lawful business in Roan Street Unwelcome Street Hazard & Street Clutter Clear & present danger – trip hazard, collision hazard, street clutter – Lime bikes strewn across the footpath in Bardsley Lane, Greenwich, without any consideration for pedestrians, the able bodied or the frail or the disabled or the partially sighted Forest eBike Users know this behaviour is “repugnantly anti-social” – it is extremely offensive and harmful to others, showing a complete disregard for social norms and a complete disregard for the well-being of our Local Community Action requested – please: a) remove (within the next two hours), and, b) create a “geo-fence exclusion zone” in this area I also invite you to issue “your Lime bike user” with either a final-warning, or a £100 fine

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manchester Road, Isle of Dogs, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree Leaning, 9th March
item.description:
Resident called to report tree leaning towards property outside number 20 Laurel Grove, please can this be looked into
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Laurel Grove, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
